owners: kernel application services orchestrate through ports
repository adapters own JDBC persistence contracts
invariants: Kernel must not depend on Spring, JDBC, Web, or HTTP client implementations.
State, type, risk, source, and reason semantics must use enums or named constants.
Repository and inbound/outbound ports must stay small and role-specific.
Adapters and starter wiring must not become business-rule owners.
Sensitive raw prompt, raw tool output, secret, credential, token, and stack trace material must not be persisted or exposed by these AI Infra surfaces.
compatBoundary: The completed implementation is scoped to the current section 21 AI Infra plan and its focused Phase 4/5/7/8B/8C/8D regression bundle; explicit future production integrations remain out of scope.
